offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in financial reporting. We automate depreciation schedules instead of manual spreadsheets.
problem: Manual calculations of fixed asset depreciation lead to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and tips
try_it: Let users try monthly schedule generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
CSV import feature for existing data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
